description: Seal the GEOX TypeScript/Python integration gap: /GEOX/log_interpreter + /GEOX/contract bridge endpoints; GEOX_log_interpreter tool added to Python MCP via httpx async call to A-FORGE-bridge:7071; httpx>=0.25.0 added to GEOX requirements.txt

integration.note: GEOX/ is gitignored; Python MCP files updated in-place but not committed to A-FORGE repo
